scripts.test: pnpm build:core && vitest run && node --test scripts/package-validation.mjs
scripts.package: pnpm build:core && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/package.mjs
scripts.package:windows: pnpm build:core && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/package.mjs --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:macos:x64: pnpm build:core && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/package.mjs --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.package:macos:arm64: pnpm build:core && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/package.mjs --target aarch64-apple-darwin
